response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with proven software craftsmanship and geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective, but the role's primary requirement—modern C++ development—hasn't been a focus in over a decade. Recent career trajectory centers on TypeScript/Node.js rather than systems-level programming. While distributed systems concepts and geospatial background are relevant, the lack of recent C++/Rust experience and no explicit routing/navigation systems work create significant gaps for a mid-senior individual contributor role requiring immediate C++ productivity.
strengths: Proven geospatial expertise through GISCollective, a production platform used by Green Map serving real-world mapping data collection needs
Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals demonstrated through TDD practice, mentoring, and consistent architecture patterns across diverse domains
Experience with large-scale distributed systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second, showing ability to design high-performance data pipelines
concerns: C++ experience is dated (2014-2015 at National Instruments); current 4-year focus on TypeScript/Node.js creates significant retraining gap for primary language requirement
No Rust experience listed and no systems-level programming in recent roles; would require substantial ramp-up time to contribute as mid-senior individual contributor
GISCollective expertise is in geo-data collection and tooling rather than routing optimization, tile generation, or commercial navigation systems

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-performance pipeline experience
